# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the storage account
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: eastus
    metadata:
      description: Location for the storage account

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  sku:
    name: "Standard_LRS"
  kind: "StorageV2"
  properties:
    accessTier: "Hot"
    allowBlobPublicAccess: true
    isHnsEnabled: false
    supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
    encryption:
      services:
        blob:
          enabled: true
        file:
          enabled: true
      keySource: "Microsoft.Storage"
    staticWebsite:
      enabled: true
      indexDocument: "index.html"
      errorDocument404Path: "error.html"

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', 'www')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  properties:
    publicAccess: "Blob"
    immutableStorageWithVersioning:
      enabled: false
    defaultEncryptionScope: "$account-key"
    denyEncryptionScopeOverride: true

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', 'assets')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  properties:
    publicAccess: "Blob"
    immutableStorageWithVersioning:
      enabled: false
    defaultEncryptionScope: "$account-key"
    denyEncryptionScopeOverride: true

outputs:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  primaryEndpoints:
    type: object
    value:
      blob: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2021-04-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
      web: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2021-04-01').primaryEndpoints.web]"
